subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him and that He Who hath come from the heaven of divine revelation is the Hidden Secret
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من سماء الامر انه لهو الغیب المکنون و
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
